questions.statement:
<p><!-- x-tinymce/html -->Which figure should replace the question mark (?) if the following figure series were to be continued?</p>

<p><img alt="" src="//storage.googleapis.com/tb-img/production/24/08/F4_Savita_SSC_06-08-24_D1.png" style="width: 397px; height: 82px;" /></p>

<p>Select the combination of letters that when sequentially placed in the blanks of the given series will complete the series.</p>

<p>_UG_HU_EH_GE_ _G_</p>
In a certain code language, &#39;BLOW&#39; is coded as &#39;3517&#39; and &#39;LIFE&#39; is coded as &#39;4258&#39;. What is the code for &#39;L&#39; in that language?

<p>Select the option that is related to the third word in the same way as the second word is related to the first word. (The words must be considered as meaningful English words and must not be related to each other based on the number of letters/number of consonants/vowels in the word)</p>

<p>Eye <strong>:</strong> See<strong> ::</strong> Skin <strong>:</strong> ?</p>

options: Only conclusions I and IV follow /
Only conclusions II and III follow /
Only conclusions I, II and IV follow /

questions.statement:
<p>Select the option that represents the letters that, when sequentially placed from left to right in the blanks, will complete the letter series.</p>

<p>_ R _ _ A R _ O _ _ G O A _ G O&nbsp;</p>
options: A G O G R A A&nbsp; /
A G O G A R R /
A A G O G R R&nbsp; /
A G G O A R R&nbsp; /

questions.statement: In a code language, &#39;government help people&#39; is written as &#39;abc pqr mno&#39;, &#39;people live happily&#39; is written as &#39;efg xyz pqr&#39;, and &#39;people choose government&#39; is written as &#39;abc pqr ijk&#39;. What is the code for the word &#39;choose&#39; in that language?

<p>Which of the following numbers will replace the question mark (?) in the given series?</p>

<p>5, 3, 20, 9, 80, 27, 320, ?</p>

<p>Select the option that is related to the fifth letter cluster in the same way as the second letter cluster is related to the first letter cluster and the fourth letter cluster is related to the third letter cluster.</p>

<p>ROYAL : ALZRO :: ABOUT : UTPAB :: POLES : ?</p>
